title: docs: research plan and hypotheses
body:
## Description
Move the competition plan and hypothesis list into `docs/`:
- `docs/plan.md` — Full competition plan
- `docs/research_log.md` — Empty template ready for experiments

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/plan.md` committed
- [ ] `docs/research_log.md` template ready
- [ ] `docs/experiment_results/` directory exists
